/Users/ashleycorona/Desktop/bwainsteww/b.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: xbrainstewx
# "app" enables Serverless Framework Dashboard features and sharing them with other Services.
app: brainstew
service: xbrainstewx

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs14.x
  region: us-east-2 
functions:
  api:
    handler: handler.api
    events:
      - http:
          path: /
          method: get
      - http:
          path: '{proxy+}'
          method: any

plugins:
  - serverless-nextjs-plugin
